title: Password hashing functions should use an unpredictable salt
description: This rule checks if password hashing functions are using an unpredictable salt.
message: Password hashing function uses a predictable salt.
recommendation: Use a secure and unpredictable salt when hashing passwords.

compliant.description: Using a random salt generated at runtime.

why_is_this_an_issue: Using a predictable salt can lead to password hash collisions, making it easier for an attacker to gain unauthorized access to accounts.
how_to_fix: Generate a random salt using a cryptographically secure pseudo-random number generator or obtain a salt from an external source.

metadata.title: Password hashing functions should use an unpredictable salt
